title: Cashier signs in and reaches the POS dashboard
description: Verifies a cashier can log in at the POS web app and land on the authenticated tabs.

steps.description: Fill username with cashier1 and password with the configured cashier password
Verify the POS dashboard or tabs are visible (not the login form)

title: Cashier adds a product to the cart
description: Verifies product selection and cart count increment on POS.

steps.description: Log in as cashier1 on http://localhost:8081
Tap a product to add it to the cart

title: Backend health check confirms API readiness
description: Verifies the ASP.NET backend health endpoint returns OK before POS workflows.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5184/api/health (backend API port 5184, not POS port 8081)
Verify the response body is OK and indicates the backend is ready
